lesson1.title: The Breakfast Robot
lesson1.story: Meet Bleep! He needs help making toast. Help him by putting the steps in order!
lesson1.success: Great job! You made an Algorithm!
lesson1.retry: Oops! Bleep made a mess. Try a different order!

lesson2.title: The Weather Coder
lesson2.story: Help Bleep decide what to wear! Look at the sky and complete the code.
lesson2.error_wrong_condition: Look at the sky! Is it really {weather}?
lesson2.error_wrong_action: Does {weather} mean you need {action}? Think again!

lesson3.title: The Robot Dance-Off
lesson3.story: Bleep wants to win the dance contest! Instead of writing the same move over and over, use a LOOP to make him repeat his favourite dance steps.
lesson3.instruction: Make Bleep SPIN 4 times using only ONE move block.
lesson3.success: Woohoo! You're a Loop Legend! Your code is now much shorter.
lesson3.hint: Put the 'Spin Around' block INSIDE the 'Repeat' block.
lesson3.feedback_too_verbose: Phew, that's a lot of work! Can you make it shorter with a Loop?
lesson3.feedback_need_spin: Bleep needs to SPIN! Try the Spin Around block.
lesson3.feedback_wrong_count: Bleep needs to spin {count} times! Change the number.

lesson4.title: The Magic Boxes
lesson4.story: Bleep needs to count how many Pastéis de Nata he collects! Use a 'Variable' box to store the number.
lesson4.instruction: Click each Pastel de Nata to collect it. Fill the variable to 5!
lesson4.success: Amazing! You used a Variable to count to 5!
lesson4.hint: Click on a Pastel de Nata to collect it!

lesson5.title: The Adventure Backpack
lesson5.story: Bleep is going to the beach! Help him put a hat and sunscreen into his 'List' (Array).
lesson5.instruction: Drag the 3 beach items into the backpack. Don't pack the trash!
lesson5.trash_feedback: That doesn't belong in a backpack!
lesson5.success: Packed and ready! You used an Array to store items!
lesson5.hint: Drag the hat, sunscreen and towel — skip the trash!

lesson6.title: The Super Move
lesson6.story: Why repeat 3 blocks when you can make one 'Function'? Name your custom move 'Mega-Jump'.
lesson6.instruction: Build your Mega-Jump function, then CALL it!
lesson6.success: Incredible! You defined AND called a Function!
lesson6.feedback_empty: The function is empty! Give me some moves first!
lesson6.feedback_missing_clap: Mega-Jump needs a Clap block too!
lesson6.hint: Put Jump, Spin and Clap inside the function, then call it!

profile.setupSub: One last step before you start coding.
profile.parentEmailHelp: We'll send them a quick email to say you're ready to code!

waitingRoom.title: Almost there! ⏳
waitingRoom.message: We sent an email to your parents! Ask them to click the link so you can start coding.
waitingRoom.subMessage: Once they say yes, come back and click a lesson!

ageGate.heading: Privacy & Protection
ageGate.body: We need to verify your age before you create an account. If you are under 16 years of age, your parent or guardian will be asked to give their consent on the next page. We do not share your data with third parties.
ageGate.checkboxLabel: I confirm I am over 16 years of age. If you are under 16 years of age, you will be asked to provide parental consent on the next page.
ageGate.ageVerifiedNote: You confirmed you are 16 or older — no parental consent needed!

auth.signInSub: Sign in to continue your coding journey.
auth.signUpSub: Create an account to start learning.
auth.lockedSub: Sign in or create a free account to play.
